ddls:
CREATE TABLE "legal_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legal instance */,
  "entity_code" TEXT /* Code representing the entity (e.g., S11) */,
  "instance_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the instance */,
  "instance_name" TEXT /* Name of the legal instance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the instance (e.g., Live, Archived) */,
  "date_enacted" TEXT /* Date when the instance was enacted */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the legal instance becomes effective */,
  "repealed_date" TEXT /* Date when the legal instance is repealed */,
  "legal_doc_open" TEXT /* Reference to the open legal document */,
  "notes_open" TEXT /* Notes related to the open status of the instance */,
  "date_archived" TEXT /* Date when the instance was archived */,
  "legal_doc_close" TEXT /* Reference to the closed legal document */,
  "notes_closed" TEXT /* Notes related to the closed status of the instance */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the instance was last modified */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the legal instance */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the legal instance */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the legal instance to track revisions */,
  "external_reference" TEXT /* Link to any external documents or resources */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_instances_entity_code FOREIGN KEY ("entity_code") REFERENCES entities ("entity_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legal_instances_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_code" TEXT /* Code representing the entity (e.g., S11) */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the entity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the entity */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Live, Archived) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legal instance it pertains to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the legal document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the document */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was last modified */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES legal_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legal instance it is related to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the note */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was last modified */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., administrative, legal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES legal_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., legal analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the legal document */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the history record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the history record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the document */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legal instance accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the document */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES legal_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "archive_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archive request */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legal instance requested for archiving */,
  "requested_by" TEXT /* User who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the archive request */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the request */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_archive_requests_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES legal_instances ("instance_id")
)
